updates.title: Establishment of Class E Airspace; Belmont, MS
updates.summary: This action proposes to establish Class E airspace extending upward from 700 feet above the surface at Tishomingo Airport, Belmont, MS. Controlled airspace is necessary for the safety and management of instrument flight rules (IFR) operations at this airport.

updates.title: Deletion of Obsolete Regulations
updates.summary: In this document, the Federal Communications Commission (Commission) acts to eliminate certain outdated, obsolete, and unnecessary rules to modernize its regulatory framework.

updates.title: Revisions to User Fees for Export and Investment Promotion Services/Events
updates.summary: The International Trade Administration (ITA) is implementing new user fees for its export and investment promotion services/events to align with guidance from the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) in Circular A-25, which calls for agencies to fully recover their costs when providing services. updates.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) finds that Zhejiang Sanmei Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. Jiangsu Sanmei Chemicals Co., Ltd.; and Fujian Qingliu Dongying Chemical Ind. Co. Ltd (collectively, Sanmei), the only mandatory respondent in this administrative review of the antidumping duty (AD) order on 1,1,1,2-Tetrafluoroethane (R-134a) from the People's Republic of China (China) covering the period of review (POR)

updates.title: Pipeline Safety: Advisory Bulletin on Preventing Excavation Damage During National Safe Digging Month and Beyond; Correction
updates.summary: PHMSA published a document in the Federal Register on April 21, 2026, issuing an advisory bulletin on preventing excavation damage. This notice corrects references to the Common Ground Alliance (CGA) Best Practices.

updates.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Proposed Collection; Comment Request; Extension
updates.summary: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC or Commission) is seeking public comment on its proposal requesting that the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) extend for three years the current Paperwork Reduction Act (PRA) clearance for information collection requirements of its Rule Governing Pre-Sale Availability of Written Warranty Terms. The current clearance expires on July 31, 2026.

updates.title: Prestressed Concrete Steel Wire Strand From Spain: Preliminary Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2024-2025
updates.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) preliminarily determines that Global Special Steel Products S.A.U. (d.b.a. Trenzas y Cables de Acero PSC, S.L.) (TYCSA) made sales of subject merchandise at less than normal value (NV) during the period of review (POR), June 1, 2024, through May 31, 2025. Interested parties are invited to comment on these preliminary results of review.

updates.title: Establishment of Class E Airspace; Rosenberg, TX
updates.summary: This action establishes Class E airspace at Lane Airpark, Rosenberg, TX. This action supports new instrument procedures and instrument flight rule (IFR) operations.

updates.title: Takes of Marine Mammals Incidental to Specified Activities; Taking Marine Mammals Incidental to the Coeur Alaska, Inc.'s Kensington Dock Repair Project in Berners Bay, Alaska
updates.summary: In accordance with regulations implementing the Marine Mammal Protection Act (MMPA) as amended, notification is hereby given that NMFS has issued an incidental harassment authorization (IHA) to Coeur Alaska, Inc. (Coeur) for authorization to take marine mammals incidental to the Kensington Dock Repair Project in Berners Bay, Alaska.

updates.title: Board of Directors; Request for Nomination
updates.summary: The Unified Carrier Registration (UCR) Plan Board of Directors is requesting nominations of qualified individuals from the motor carrier industry for consideration by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA) for appointment by FMCSA to the UCR Plan Board of Directors to fill a vacancy that has arisen.
